title: Tankmaker KNDS lays out IPO plans amid defense selloff in Europe
summary_full: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.
summary_public: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.

FR.label: neutral
